output: Completed batch 5 verification. A throwaway repro test under `src/tools/video-editor` reproduced the grouped-boundary drift and lost-pointer-capture stuck-preview symptoms in legacy `before` mode, confirmed the fixed behavior in current `after` mode, and was deleted afterward. The final validation sequence now passes for the targeted persistence/migration suites, grouped-flow suites, the full `src/tools/video-editor` Vitest sweep, and the filtered TypeScript gate for `src/tools/video-editor`. Checkpointed the result to `.megaplan/plans/finish-the-projection-model-20260408-1628/execution_batch_5.json`.
deviations: Vitest only includes `src/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}` in this repo, so the temporary repro file was moved from `.megaplan/...` into `src/tools/video-editor/` before the before/after runs, then deleted after verification.

task_updates.executor_notes: Created a throwaway repro test under `src/tools/video-editor`, ran it in `REPRO_MODE=before` to reproduce both the grouped-boundary drift and lost-pointer-capture stuck-preview symptoms, then ran it in `REPRO_MODE=after` to confirm the fixed behavior and deleted it afterward. Final verification passed on the accepted sequence: targeted suites (`migrate`, `serialize`, `timeline-save-utils`, `render-bounds.validation`), grouped-flow suites (`TimelineCanvas`, `useShotGroups`, `useClipDrag`, `useClipEditing`, `useExternalDrop`, `useTimelineTrackManagement`), the full `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor` sweep (40 files, 210 tests), and the filtered TypeScript gate (`npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | rg '^src/tools/video-editor'`) with no remaining `src/tools/video-editor` diagnostics.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The throwaway repro test reproduced the old drift and stuck-preview states in `REPRO_MODE=before`, then confirmed adjacency preservation and lost-capture cleanup in `REPRO_MODE=after`, and was deleted afterward. The final repo state passes the targeted suites, grouped-flow suites, the full `src/tools/video-editor` Vitest run, and the filtered TypeScript gate with no remaining `src/tools/video-editor` diagnostics.
